docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $125.00 FILED BY METRO CAB LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CCSF ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-19-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF METRO CAB LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00) SERVED FEB-05-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CCSF

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-19-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-19-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARK P. SCHREIBER. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDE RETAINED. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. CLERK:S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF METRO CAB LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CCSF
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-19-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF METRO CAB LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CCSF $95.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $125.00, THE COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF'S ACTION DID NOT BEGIN TO ACCRUE UNTIL SEPTEMBER 17, 2007 WHEN HE WAS REQUIRED TO PAY THE PARKING TICKET TO DMV DESPITE HIS PENDING REQUEST FOR ADMINITRATIVE REVIEW. ACORDINGLY, HIS CLAIM WAS TIMELY AND PLAINTIFF HAS PROVED HIS CLAIM BY A PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE. COMMISSIONER PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER, CLERK, S. VANTREE; NOT REPORTED (506) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
